title: Move page level buttons to the top of the screen instead of the bottom of the page
description:
Currently buttons for 'Add Goal' and 'Add Initiative' are at the bottom
of the page.  This is cumbersome, requires user to scroll to bottom 
to use them.  Move buttons to the top of associated pages.

title: Move Buttons to top of page
description:
There are multiple pages that have buttons at the bottom of the page
This is bad cause the user needs to scroll to the bottom to add an entity
Move buttons to the top of the page.
Examples include goals and initiatives.
